popularStory.headline: Matilda of Leuven
popularStory.description: Matilda was a direct descendant of Charlemagne[2][10] and in terms of rank descendants of Charlemagne were among the most prestigious brides.[11] Noble families of the eleventh and twelfth centuries s …

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
When Mathilde van Leuven was born in 0984, in Leuven, Flemish Brabant, Belgium, her father, Graaf Lambert I met de Baard van Leuven, was 14 and her mother, Gerberga van Neder-Lotharingen, was 9. She married Graaf Lambert I met de Baard van Leuven in 1010, in Lens, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. She died in 1049, in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 65, and was buried in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.
LESS


http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/BRABANT,%20LOUVAIN.htm#MathildeLouvainMEustacheIBoulogne
“Royal Ancestry: A Study in Colonial & Medieval Families,” Douglas Richardson (2013):
  “EUSTACHE I a l'Oeil, Count of Boulogne, son and heir of Baldwin, Count of Boulogne, by his wife, Adelvie de Gant, born about 995. He married MATHILDE (or MAHAUT) OF LOUVAIN, daughter of Lambert I, Count of Louvain, by Gerberge, daughter of Charles, Duke of Lower Lorraine. She was born about 993. They had three sons, Eustache (II) [Count of Boulogne], Lambert [Count of Lens], and Godfrey (or Geoffrey) [Bishop of Paris, Arch-Chancellor of France], and one daughter, Gerberge (wife of Friedrich II, Duke of Lower Lorraine). EUSTACHE I, Count of Boulogne, died about 1049. 
  L'Art de Vérifier les Dates 2 (1784): 760-767 (sub Comtes de Boulogne). Delisle Recueil des Historiens des Gaules et de la France 11 (1876): 205-206 (Ex Genealogia de qua ortis est Carolus Magnus), 346 (Ex Genealogia Comitum Bononiensium), 370 (Ex Genealogia B. Arnulphi Metensis Episcopi); 374 (Genealogix ex Chronicis Hainoniensibus); 13 (1869): 585 (Ex Genealogia Caroli Magni qua Namurcensium Comitum et Boloniens), 647-648 (Ex Genealogia B. Amulphi). Monumenta Germaniae Historica 9 (1925): 300-301; 14 (1925): 621. Sellers De Carpentier Allied Ancestry (1928): 185-187. Brandenburg Die Nachkommen Karls des Großen (1935): IX 69. Schwennicke Europäische Stammtafeln 1 (1980): 95 (sub Hainault, Brabant); 3(4) (1989): 621 (sub Boulogne). Winter Descs. of Charlemagne (800-1400) (1987): IX.69, XI.461j, X.124-X.127. 
  Children of Eustache I of Boulogne, by Mathilde of Louvain: 
     i. EUSTACHE II, Count of Boulogne [see below]. 
     ii. LAMBERT OF BOULOGNE, Count of Lens, married ALICE OF NORMANDY, Countess of Aumale [see AUMALE 1].”

zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde gravin van Leuven於大約1000年出生在比利時布拉班特洛文時，她的父親Lambert I met de Baard graaf van Leuven-Henegouwen50歲，母親Gerberge de Basse-Lotharingie26歲。她與Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne在比利時布拉班特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1049年在法國i萊-德-福朗斯豪-德-布洛-比藍古特享年50歲，埋葬在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathilde gravin van Leuven于大约1000年出生在比利时布拉班特洛文时，她的父亲Lambert I met de Baard graaf van Leuven-Henegouwen50岁，母亲Gerberge de Basse-Lotharingie26岁。她与Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne在比利时布拉班特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1049年在法国i萊-德-福朗斯豪-德-布洛-比藍古特享年50岁，埋葬在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅。

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde gravin van Leuven was born about 1000, in Leuven, Brabant, Belgium, her father, Lambert I met de Baard graaf van Leuven-Henegouwen, was 50 and her mother, Gerberge de Basse-Lotharingie, was 26. She married Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne in Brabant, Belgium. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1049, in Boulogne-Billancourt, Hauts-de-Seine, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 50, and was buried in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde gravin van Leuven est née environ 1000, à Louvain, Brabant, Belgique, son père, Lambert I met de Baard graaf van Leuven-Henegouwen, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Gerberge de Basse-Lotharingie, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne à Brabant, Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1049, à Boulogne-Billancourt, Hauts-de-Seine, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde gravin van Leuven um 1000 in Leuven, Brabant, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lambert I met de Baard graaf van Leuven-Henegouwen 50 und ihre Mutter Gerberge de Basse-Lotharingie 26. Sie hat in Brabant, Belgien Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1049 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Boulogne-Billancourt, Hauts-de-Seine, Île-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde gravin van Leuven è nata il circa 1000 nel Leuven, Brabante, Belgio, sua padre, Lambert I met de Baard graaf van Leuven-Henegouwen, aveva 50 anni e sua madre, Gerberge de Basse-Lotharingie, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne nel Brabante, Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1049, nel Boulogne-Billancourt, Hauts-de-Seine, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde gravin van Leuvenが約1000年にベルギーブラバントレウベンで生まれた時，父Lambert I met de Baard graaf van Leuven-Henegouwenは50歳，母Gerberge de Basse-Lotharingieは26歳であった。ベルギーブラバントでEustache Ier comte de Boulogneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1049年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスハウトス-デ-セアインボウログネ-ビランコウルトで50歳で死去し，フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスボウログネ-スル-マーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde gravin van Leuven(이)가 대략 1000년 벨기에 브라반트 레우븐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lambert I met de Baard graaf van Leuven-Henegouwen(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gerberge de Basse-Lotharingie(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 벨기에 브라반트에서 Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1049년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 하츠-데-세이인 부로그니-빌랭쿠르트에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 부로그니-수-머에 묻혔다.

pt.Cuijk, Limburg, Noord-Brabant, Nederland: Cuijk, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde gravin van Leuven nasceu aproximadamente 1000, em Leuven, Brabante, Bélgica, seu pai, Lambert I met de Baard graaf van Leuven-Henegouwen, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Gerberge de Basse-Lotharingie, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne em Brabante, Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1049, em Boulogne-Billancourt, Hauts-de-Seine, Île-de-France, França, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde gravin van Leuven родилась около 1000 г. в местности леувен, брабант, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Lambert I met de Baard graaf van Leuven-Henegouwen было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Gerberge de Basse-Lotharingie, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne в местности брабант, Бельгия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1049 г. в местности боулогне-билланкоурт, хауц-де-син, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности боулогне-сур-мир, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция.

es.Cuijk, Limburg, Noord-Brabant, Nederland: Cuijk, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde gravin van Leuven nació aproximadamente 1000, en Leuven, Brabante, Bélgica, su papá, Lambert I met de Baard graaf van Leuven-Henegouwen, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Gerberge de Basse-Lotharingie, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne en Brabante, Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1049, en Boulogne-Billancourt, Hauts-de-Seine, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultada en Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.
